task: FH-3 Amortization Schedule Engine (Tier 3). Create loans + generate/store amortization schedules. New schema finance.* (finance.loans + finance.loan_amortization_rows, RLS ENABLE+FORCE, grants, audit cols). Reuses FH-2 loan-math (buildAmortizationSchedule) for the math. Persists to finance.* ONLY — performs NO GL posting (no accounting.* writes, no posting engine). Posting the principal/interest split (Dr Note Payable / Dr Interest / Cr cash) is a LATER gated step behind FINANCE_HUB_AMORTIZATION_POST_ENABLED; the posted/journal columns exist as forward hooks. Entire feature gated behind FINANCE_HUB_AMORTIZATION_ENABLED (migration 202606160100 registers both flags default OFF): routes 404 feature_disabled when OFF; frontend tab/page hidden when OFF. Boundary enforced by scripts/verify-fh3-no-posting.mjs. CI-gated DB test proves the schedule persists balanced (principal sums to loan, ends at 0, nothing posted). Stacked on FH-2 (imports loan-wizard/loan-math.ts); rebase onto main after #1023 merges. Additive-only; ship on green, Jorge merges.
